mapper.select: select * from ygt_chat_message where ygt_cm_corp_id = #{corpId} and ygt_cm_msg_id = #{msgId} limit 1
select * from ygt_chat_message where ygt_cm_corp_id = #{corpId} and ygt_cm_seq = #{seq} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_chat_message (ygt_cm_corp_id, ygt_cm_group_id, ygt_cm_chat_id, ygt_cm_msg_id, ygt_cm_seq, ygt_cm_public_key_ver, ygt_cm_action, ygt_cm_from_user, ygt_cm_msg_time, ygt_cm_msg_type, ygt_cm_content, ygt_cm_raw_json, ygt_cm_parse_status, ygt_cm_parse_error, ygt_cm_create_time, ygt_cm_update_time) values (#{ygtCmCorpId}, #{ygtCmGroupId}, #{ygtCmChatId}, #{ygtCmMsgId}, #{ygtCmSeq}, #{ygtCmPublicKeyVer}, #{ygtCmAction}, #{ygtCmFromUser}, #{ygtCmMsgTime}, #{ygtCmMsgType}, #{ygtCmContent}, #{ygtCmRawJson}, #{ygtCmParseStatus}, #{ygtCmParseError}, #{ygtCmCreateTime}, #{ygtCmUpdateTime})
mapper.update: update ygt_chat_message set ygt_cm_parse_status = #{ygtCmParseStatus}, ygt_cm_parse_error = #{ygtCmParseError}, ygt_cm_update_time = now() where ygt_chat_message_id = #{ygtChatMessageId}
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_chat_message where ygt_chat_message_id in #{id}
